## What does this PR do?

<!-- One sentence summary -->

## Type of change

- [ ] New level (season X, level Y)
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] CLI / engine improvement
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Chore / dependency update

## Level checklist (fill out for new/modified levels only)

- [ ] `node scripts/validate-levels.mjs <level-id>` passes
- [ ] Starter code fails behavior tests
- [ ] Starter code is exploitable (attack passes)
- [ ] Reference code passes all tests and blocks the exploit
- [ ] No real credentials or PII in any file
- [ ] `manifest.json` is correct (`id`, `difficulty`, `tags`, `apiRequired`)

## General checklist

- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] I have read CONTRIBUTING.md
